name: Barbell Bench Press
setup: Lie flat on bench with eyes under the barbell
Feet planted firmly on the floor
Grip bar slightly wider than shoulder-width
Retract scapulae and arch upper back slightly
execution: Unrack the bar with straight arms
Lower bar to mid-chest with elbows at ~75 degrees
Touch chest lightly, then drive bar back up
Lock out at the top without hyperextending elbows
cues: Pull the bar apart (bend the bar)
spotting: Two hands alternating grip, assist on concentric
